issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for the showcased operations.

scenarios.name: Optimize a slow CSV aggregation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used eager pl.read_csv and stepwise reassignment; treatment used scan_csv with a single chained lazy pipeline ending in collect() and proper str.to_date()/dt.year() expressions.

scenarios.name: Translate slow pandas apply to Polars
scenarios.rationale: Baseline kept a Python lambda via map_elements (still row-by-row); treatment used the vectorized pl.when/then/otherwise pattern documented in the skill.
